description: PoliceRequestPrincipalApp holds the application principal information for a PoliceRequest. This is required for requests in an apps namespace when using an AppToken. When using a ComponentToken, the app and component are inferred from the token claims; if provided, they must match.

IP.description: The source IP address of the request.
IP.title: IP

direction.description: The direction of the traffic for this request. Determines whether ingress or egress policies are evaluated for the app component.
direction.title: direction

ingressSourceToken.description: A valid component token representing the source application component for ingress requests. When set, it will be validated and used to populate the request principal with the source app/component identity. Only applicable when the direction is Ingress.
ingressSourceToken.title: ingressSourceToken

port.description: The port of the ingress listener for this request. Required when direction is Ingress to select the correct listener configuration. Mirrors the X-Acuvity-Ingress-Port header used by the cloud-apex agent.
port.title: port

userClaims.description: The optional user claims of the request. This can be an incomplete list, and claims can be mapped to different keys.
userClaims.title: userClaims

username.description: The optional username of the request.
username.title: username

title: PoliceRequestPrincipalApp
